chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S- 852 OF 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE 1. FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.7993/2023 2. FOR ORDERS ON MAINTAINABILITY OF PETITION 12.03.2025 Mr. Raja Zeeshan advocate holding brief for Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed Shah, advocate for intervenor Mr. Zahoor Shah, APG -x-x-x-x-x-x- This petition was fixed on 05.09.2023 when subject to maintainability, notice was issued to the respondents and Prosecutor General Sindh. Since then learned counsel for the petitioner has not shown appearance. Today, neither petitioner nor his counsel are present. Same position was on the last couple of dates. On last date of hearing viz 26.02.,2025 learned counsel for the petitioner sought time to file counter affidavit to the application under Order I Rule 10, CPC but today no one is in attendance for the petitioner. This petition has been filed to restrain the official respondents from causing harassment to the petitioner. Since no one is in attendance, however, it would be appropriate to direct the respondent No.6 to conduct himself in accordance. The Petition stands` disposed of accordingly. J U D G E MUSHARRAF ALI
